uuid.description: Unique identifier of an recovery case

company_uuid.description: Unique identifier of the company to which the recovery case belongs

latest_error_code.description: The latest bank error code for the recovery case. See [this doc](https://docs.gusto.com/embedded-payroll/docs/ach-codes-and-transaction-types) for a list of common ACH return codes.

original_debit_date.description: Date when funds were originally debited from the company's bank account

check_date.description: Check date for the associated payroll or contractor payments

payroll_uuid.description: The uuid of the associated payroll for which the recovery case was created. If the recovery case was created for a contractor payment, this field will be null.

contractor_payment_uuids.description: The uuids of the associated contractor payments for which the recovery case was created. If the recovery case was created for a payroll, this field will be null.

amount_outstanding.description: Amount outstanding for the recovery case

event_total_amount.description: Total amount to be debited from the payroll or contractor payments

404.description:
Not Found 
  
The requested resource does not exist. Make sure the provided UUID is valid.
